validation.email: The {{attribute}} must be a valid email address
validation.url: The {{attribute}} must be a valid URL
validation.uuid: The {{attribute}} must be a valid UUID

validation.alpha_numeric: The {{attribute}} must contain only letters and numbers
validation.date: The {{attribute}} must be a valid date
validation.time: The {{attribute}} must be a valid time
validation.datetime: The {{attribute}} must be a valid datetime
validation.local_datetime: The {{attribute}} must be a valid local datetime
validation.timezone: The {{attribute}} must be a valid timezone

validation.after: The {{attribute}} must be a date after {{other}}
validation.after_or_equal: The {{attribute}} must be a date after or equal to {{other}}

validation.allowed_extensions: The {{attribute}} file extension is not allowed
